mapper.sql: j.id, j.order_no, j.project_id, j.content, j.paotui_id, j.paotui_name, j.create_time, p.title as project_title
mapper.select: select from jiaoyifankui j left join paotuixiangmu p on j.project_id = p.id where j.id = #{id}

select from jiaoyifankui j left join paotuixiangmu p on j.project_id = p.id
and (j.content like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or j.order_no like concat('%',#{keyword},'%'))
and j.paotui_id = #{paotuiId}
order by j.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into jiaoyifankui (order_no, project_id, content, paotui_id, paotui_name, create_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{projectId}, #{content}, #{paotuiId}, #{paotuiName}, now())

insert into jiaoyifankui
order_no, project_id, content, paotui_id, paotui_name, create_time,
#{orderNo}, #{projectId}, #{content}, #{paotuiId}, #{paotuiName}, now(),
